mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_point (name, location, description, image, status, apply_status, show_to_student, animal_count, today_feed_count, latitude, longitude, submitter_id, submitter_name) VALUES (#{name}, #{location}, #{description}, #{image}, #{status}, #{applyStatus}, #{showToStudent}, #{animalCount}, #{todayFeedCount}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{submitterId}, #{submitterName})
mapper.update:
UPDATE feed_point
name = #{name},
location = #{location},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
status = #{status},
apply_status = #{applyStatus},
show_to_student = #{showToStudent},
animal_count = #{animalCount},
today_feed_count = #{todayFeedCount},
latitude = #{latitude},
longitude = #{longitude},
submitter_id = #{submitterId},
submitter_name = #{submitterName},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM feed_point WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT fp.id, fp.name, fp.location, fp.description, fp.image, fp.status, fp.apply_status AS applyStatus, fp.show_to_student AS showToStudent, fp.animal_count AS animalCount, fp.today_feed_count AS todayFeedCount, fp.latitude, fp.longitude, fp.submitter_id AS submitterId, COALESCE(fp.submitter_name, u.name, u.username) AS submitterName, fp.create_time AS createTime, fp.update_time AS updateTime FROM feed_point fp LEFT JOIN user u ON fp.submitter_id = u.id WHERE fp.id = #{id}
